claimText: SNU Library states that most e-resource subscription agreements only permit viewing, downloading, and printing; using resources for AI training/analysis or uploading to third-party AI services requires separate authorization.

citation.citationTitle: 중앙도서관 구독 전자자료의 생성형 AI활용 관련 유의사항 안내
